## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / code quality
- [ ] 🔧 Chore / dependency update
- [ ] 📝 Docs only

## Related Issues

Closes #

## Testing

- [ ] Unit tests added / updated
- [ ] Integration tests added / updated (Testcontainers)
- [ ] Manually tested locally (Docker Compose up + API call)

## Checklist

- [ ] `./gradlew spotlessApply` has been run (no formatting diff)
- [ ] `./gradlew :constant-extractor-api:check :constant-extractor-bytecode:check :constant-extractor-config-file:check` passes with ≥ 85% coverage
- [ ] No new secrets, credentials, or API keys committed
- [ ] Dependabot / dependency upgrade alerts reviewed
- [ ] PR title follows conventional commit style (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
